TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Koyo ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 424 buwan, 976 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 283 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 693 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Sakizaya 1%, Truku 3%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Koyo hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Koyo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Koyo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Koyo hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Koyo hya' ga Maifor. tay 'llaw na Koyo hya' ga Ukang. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Koyo ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Koyo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kojo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa mai*or. taj ʔllaw na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa ukaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kojo ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kojo ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Koyo ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 424 buwan, 976 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 283 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 693 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 20%, Sakizaya 1%, Truku 3%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Koyo hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Koyo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Koyo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Koyo hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Koyo hya' ga Maifor. tay 'llaw na Koyo hya' ga Ukang. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Koyo ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Koyo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kojo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, s~ɕakizaja *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa mai*or. taj ʔllaw na kojo ħjaʔ ɣa ukaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kojo ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kojo ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
